race.comment: PUGLIA (9) resumes. She was racing well last time in and has always promised a bit. Finds the right race today and look for a market push. CROSSOVERKID (11) resumes. His fresh run last time in at Cranbourne was good and he can be hitting the line well. VIANARRA (6) form has dropped off in last two after a win at Geelong three runs back. Great chance to rediscover form. CHAMPAGNE JENNI (7) last appeared when she finished 11th over 1733m at Geelong on June 19 in a disappointing run. Gets a chance to atone. WILD RUBY (12) settled on the speed at Bordertown last start and wasn't far off the winner in second at the end of 1550m. In the mix also.
